item.name: fine-tunes
{fine-tune-id}
events

Microsoft Azure Gets The Events For The Fine Tune Job Specified By The Given Fine Tune Id 
events Are Created When The Job Status Changes, E G Running Or Complete, And When Results Are Uploaded

query.description:
A flag indicating whether to stream events for the fine-tune job. If set to true,
            events will be sent as data-only server-sent events as they become available. The stream will terminate with
            a data: [DONE] message when the job is finished (succeeded, cancelled, or failed).
            If set to false, only events generated so far will be returned..

variable.description: (Required) The identifier of the fine-tune job.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description:
A flag indicating whether to stream events for the fine-tune job. If set to true,
            events will be sent as data-only server-sent events as they become available. The stream will terminate with
            a data: [DONE] message when the job is finished (succeeded, cancelled, or failed).
            If set to false, only events generated so far will be returned..

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: models
{model-id}
Microsoft Azure Gets Details For The Model Specified By The Given Modelid

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Success

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.body:
{
  "capabilities": {
    "completion": "<boolean>",
    "embeddings": "<boolean>",
    "fine_tune": "<boolean>",
    "inference": "<boolean>",
    "scale_types": [
      "standard",
      "standard"
    ]
  },
  "deprecation": {
    "inference": "<integer>",
    "fine_tune": "<integer>"
  },
  "lifecycle_status": "generally-available",
  "object": "fine-tune",
  "status": "succeeded",
  "created_at": "<integer>",
  "updated_at": "<integer>",
  "id": "<string>",
  "model": "<string>",
  "fine_tune": "<string>"
}

response.name: An error occurred.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
